mapper.sql: e.eucr_id, e.oprtr_id, o.oprtr_nm, e.rprt_yr, e.eucr_ver, e.eucr_st_cd, e.ttl_qty, e.ofst_req_qty, e.fulfilled_yn, e.sbmt_dt, e.aprv_dt, e.use_bgng_dt, e.use_end_dt, e.frst_reg_dt, e.frst_reg_user_id, e.last_chg_dt, e.last_chg_user_id
FROM er.tn_eucr e JOIN com.tn_oprtr o ON o.oprtr_id = e.oprtr_id AND NOW() BETWEEN o.use_bgng_dt AND o.use_end_dt WHERE NOW() BETWEEN e.use_bgng_dt AND e.use_end_dt

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM com.tn_vrfcn_assgn va WHERE va.vrfcn_inst_id = #{vrfcnInstId} AND va.oprtr_id = e.oprtr_id AND va.rprt_yr = e.rprt_yr AND NOW() BETWEEN va.use_bgng_dt AND va.use_end_dt )

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(eucr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0 ) FROM er.tn_eucr WHERE eucr_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(eucr_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_eucr (eucr_id, oprtr_id, rprt_yr, eucr_ver, eucr_st_cd, ttl_qty, ofst_req_qty, fulfilled_yn, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{eucrId}, #{oprtrId}, #{rprtYr}, #{eucrVer}, 'DRAFT', 0, COALESCE(#{ofstReqQty}, 0), 'N', NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET ofst_req_qty = #{ofstReqQty}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND eucr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND eucr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sub_qty), 0) FROM er.tn_eucr_batch WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.update: UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET ttl_qty = #{ttlQty}, fulfilled_yn = #{fulfilledYn}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET eucr_st_cd = 'SBMTD', sbmt_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND eucr_st_cd = 'DRAFT' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt

UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET eucr_st_cd = 'APRVD', aprv_dt = NOW(), last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND eucr_st_cd IN ('RVWNG', 'RCMDD') AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
UPDATE er.tn_eucr SET eucr_st_cd = 'CNCLD', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE eucr_id = #{eucrId} AND eucr_st_cd = 'APRVD' AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
